query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `compliance_reviews` (
  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `user_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `organization_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `review_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'content_review',
  `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `content_hash` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `original_content` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `flagged_issues` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `applied_fixes` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `severity` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'low',
  `reviewer_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reviewed_at` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_compliance_reviews_user` (`user_id`),
  KEY `idx_compliance_reviews_status` (`status`)
);
